_note: Finding 5 regression: every prompt opened a reference and THEN errored (turn-cap / timeout / api-error) — a network/timeout outage mid-run. The all-errored runner-failure gate must return exit 2. The pre-fix gate also required `not references_opened`, so this outage was mis-reported as a content FAIL (exit 1). Markers match ERR_TURN_CAP / ERR_TIMEOUT in grounded_rate.py.

records.final_response_text: Opened a reference, then exhausted the tool-turn budget.
Opened a reference, then the per-prompt deadline passed.
Opened a reference, then the API returned an error.
